job_title: AI Creative Activation Sales Specialist, LCS, CEE
about_company: Businesses of all shapes and sizes rely on Google’s unparalleled advertising solutions to help them grow in today’s dynamic marketing environment. You bring a passion for sales, knowledge of online media, and commitment to maximize customer success. You act like an owner, move with velocity through change, finding innovative and strategic ways to consistently deliver extraordinary and incremental outcomes for both Google and your customers.
required_skills: Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience

8 years of experience in media operations, digital ad operations, creative agency operations, performance media or business development role within influencer marketing, social media, or digital advertising
Experience in a client-facing role, particularly in sales or marketing
Ability to communicate in English fluently
preferred_skills: Experience with project management, involving the delivery of high profile projects
Experience in executing successful Go-to-Market plans related to creative, partners, or AI solutions
Expertise in the creative development process and the creative ecosystem
Ability to operate in a fast-moving, sometimes ambiguous space and navigate large, complicated organizations
Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to present to executive audiences
responsibilities: Drive the adoption of third-party (3P) creative technology partners across priority customers to establish long-term, sustainable creative habits
Build and deliver compelling, data-driven pitches tailored to specific client needs in collaboration with partners
Act as the Center of Excellence (CoE) for partners’ creative capabilities, educating internal sales teams on when and how to pitch 3Ps to customers

Utilize strategic creative incentive funds to de-risk partner trials with priority customers. Monitor and track client-partner projects to ensure they remain on schedule, meet quality standards, and deliver on Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
Identify priority customers for activation and match customers with priority partners to inform pitches based on customer creative advancement opportunities
Comply with all company health and safety policies, procedures, and legal requirements
requirements: Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience

8 years of experience in media operations, digital ad operations, creative agency operations, performance media or business development role within influencer marketing, social media, or digital advertising
Experience in a client-facing role, particularly in sales or marketing
Ability to communicate in English fluently
